titleStmt.title: SII 9.104: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 104. (A.R. No. 441 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE VERANDA OF THE UDDIBASAVANNA TEMPLE AT MORIGERI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Śaka 967, Vyaya, Kārtika, puṇṇami, Sōmagrahaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1046, October 17, with a lunar eclipse, the Śaka year, however, being 968 expired. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva (Sōmēśvara I) and mentions his feudatory Traiḷōkyamalla-Nanni-Noḷamba Pallava-Permānaḍi ruling over Ballakunde three-hundred, Kōgaḷi fivehundred Kaḍaṁbaḷige thousand, Kudiyaharavi seventy, Kariviḍi thirty and Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand. It records that the Leṅka 1000, who are stated to be the pillars of the Pallava kingdom, Vīrāvatāras and Ēkaikavīras, and ruling over the six towns of Ammeḷe, Nelkudure, Sonna, Poḷalgunde Sūgūru and Mōṟiṅgere, with the Daṇḍanāyaka Tikaṇṇa as their chief, obtained permssion from the king and made a grant of 100 mattars of land got from Ballavarasa, for the service of the god (Noḻambēśvara) and for imparting education, after washing the feet of the teacher Sōmēśvara-Paṇḍita, in the presence of the god Virūpāksha. It also records that the Daṇḍanāyaka Sōvimayya constructed a well, named it Sōmatīrtha and made grants of land and garden for the service of the same god. Others also made similar gifts. The writer was Vishṇayya and the engraver Kaliyōja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabha
ṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁ saluttire tatpādapadmōpajīvi sa
madhigatapaṁcamahāśabda pallavānvaya śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ pallavakulatiḷakanamōghavākyaṁ kāṁ
cīpuravarēśvaraṁ vairinārāyaṇaṁ drōhakāḷānaḷaṁ maṇḍaḷikatriṇētraṁ rājamanōjam hayavatsa
rājaṁ citraveḍaṁgaṁ tyāgacintāmaṇi rājagajasarvvajñaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamallananninoḷaṁbapallavapermmā
naḍigaḷ ballakunde mūnūṟu kōgaḷiyaynūṟukaḍaṁbaḷige sāyira kudiyaharaviyerppattu kari
viḍi mūvattumaṁ paṁcagrāmaṁgaḷumaṁ . noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvatticchāsiramumanacaḷapravṛttiyiṁ duṣṭanigraha
viśiṣṭapratipāḷanadināḷuttire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷ samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara śrī
noḷaṁbādhirājaśrīpādapadmāmōdāśaktamadhukarar vairibaḷabhīkarar pallavānvayamahā rājarājya
mūḷastaṁbhātmakar cuvarīdhvajavirājitarānevaṟeghōṣaṇarsatyamaṇibhūṣaṇar dharmmānukūḷar jaya
vadhūlōlar kaṇḍaḷīmūḷabhadrōdbhavavīrāvatārarēkaikavīrar dīnānāthacintāmaṇigaḷāśritajana
kalpavṛkṣarsaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara nāmādisamastaprasastisahita śrīmaddaṇḍanāyaka tikaṇnapra
mukhalēṁkasāsirvvaru Ārmmeḷe nelkudure sonna poḷalgundesūgūru mōṟaṁgeḻe modalāgāṟuṁ bāḍamuma
naṇugajīvitavāgi tribhōgābhyantara siddhiyināḷuttaṁ . vāridhiparivṛtadhātrīnāriya vadanadavoleseva
kōgaḷināḍoḷmō ringeṟe tiḷakāḷaṁkāramananukaṟipudene janaṁ baṇnisade . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa
japahōmasamādhisaṁpannarappa śrīman mōriṁgeṟeya Ūroḍeyar pannirbbara kaiyoḷ daṇḍanāyaka tikaṇnapramukhalēnka
sāsirvvaru ttaragadyāṇamuṁ sahiraṇyadhārāpūrvvakadinduṟuke dēvarakereya puṇiseya madhyadi bhūmiyaṁ mā
ṟugoṇḍa nūṟirppattu mattamadaṟa hattasina tannabaḷadoḷage barmmayyaṁ vidyādānakke koṭṭa mattarppanne raḍu ma
ttadharmātakrayadiṁ koṭṭa mattarppanneraḍu Alliṁ mūḍamogade yātana tammaṁdircavuNḍayyanoḷagāgi koṭṭa matta
rppattu Antumattarnnūṟayvattāṟuvaṁ dēvarupabhōgakkaṁ pādamūlaparivārakkaṁ maṭhada vidyādānakkaveṁdarasa
rgge binnapaṁgeydu sakavarṣa 967 neya vyayasaṁvatsaradakārttikada puṇname sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu virūpākṣadēvara samī
padalu yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇajapasamādhisampannarappa kōgaḷiyaynūṟaṟa maṭhādhipatigaḷa
ppa śrīmaḷeyāḷapaṇḍitadēvara varaśiṣyar śrījñānēśvarapaṇṇitara varaśiṣyar samastaśāstrapārāvāragarappa śrīma
t sōmēśvarapaṇḍitaravara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ sarvvanamasyaṁ svarvabādhāparihāra tribhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhiyāgi
padapadmake dattiyāgi śrīballavarasara kaiyoḷ paḍedu biṭṭar . Ā bhūmiyoḷage daṇḍanāyaka tikaṇnana dēgu
lakke mattarirppattu . Antābhūmige sīme paḍuva laṁ mēre baḍaga bannikalla polaṁ mēre mūḍesevaṇbolaṁ
teṁka sōvimayyana baḷa mēre . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ pra
rannasannāhaṁ śivapādaśēkharaṁ nītiratnākaraṁ nuḍidaṁtegaṇḍaṁ patihitagaruḍa nāmādisamastaprasastisahita śīmaddaṇḍanā
yaka sōmimayyaṁ mōriṁgeṟeyūroḍeyarppanna leṁkasāsirbbara sannidhānadali Ū mākimayyaṁ
gaṁmallipayyaṁgaṁ ponnakoṭṭu keḷageya keṟeyuṁ keṟeyakeḷagaṇamūṟu mattarkkeyyumaṁ sahiraṇyaṁgoṭṭu
rāpūrvvakaṁ māṟugoṇḍa keṟeyoḷage bāviyanagaḷisi sōmatīrthamendu pesaraniṭṭu pūdōNṭaṁ nandanavana
mumaniṭṭu keṟe bāvi tōṁṭakeṟe ma sōmēśvarapaṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci noḷaṁbēśvaradēvarige koṭṭar .
Ūroḍeya nāraṇamayyana maga nāgavarmayyanumātana tamma viṣṇayyanu tamma bēvinakeṟeya
ke sahiraṇyaṁgoṇḍu noḷaṁbēśvaradēvarige koṭṭa matta 3 . Intī nituṁ kōgaḷiya gaḍiṁbadalu matta
mūṟugēṇa kōloḷaḷedu koṭṭar . Intī dharmmamaṁ rakṣisidātaṁge vāraṇāsiyoḷ sāsira kavileyaṁ brāha
ṇarigaṁ tapōdhanarigaṁ koṭṭa puṇyamakku . Intī dharmmamanaḷidātaṁga naḷiyaloḍaṁbaṭṭaṁgaṁ vāraṇāsiyoḷaṁ kuru
kṣētradoḷaṁ prayāgeyoḷaṁ sāsira kavileyumaṁ brāhmaṇarumaṁ tapōdhanarumanaḷidapāpamakku
bahubhirvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhūmiḥ tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyō
yaṁ dharmasēturnnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarbānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrān bhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . bhūmiratnāśvanāgānāṁ gōhiraṇyādivāsasāṁ . bhavētpūrvvapradattānāṁ dānāccha
taguṇaṁ phalaṁ . yatpradānādvasētsvargē yāvatkālasya sankheyā . tasmācchataguṇaṁ kāḷaṁ ta(r)ddharttā narakē va
sēt . Ūroḍeya nāraṇamayyana magaṁ viṣṇayya baredaṁ rūvāri mūccōjana ma gaṁ kaliyōjaṁ besageyda .
Digital edition of SII 9.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
